title: Digital Signal Processing
outline: This course aims to develop an advanced understanding of digital signal processing. Topics include: discrete time signals and systems; the discrete Fourier transform properties and fast algorithms; the z- transform; frequency response from z-plane; FIR and IIR filter design and structures for digital filters. The course includes a specialist component in an applied or advanced signal processing application area.
lecture_times: See departmental timetable and official class schedule.
dp_requirements: Please refer to the official course handout document for detailed information regarding the DP requirements for this course.
